authority_label: Open-source maintainer of actproof-py and actproof-events
title: IETF SCITT working group engagement record
subtitle: Reference implementation contributor engagement for grant evaluation and public archival

claim_fields.engagement_focus_summary: Implementation experience contribution to the IETF Supply Chain Integrity, Transparency, and Trust working group, with focus on RFC 8785 JSON canonicalization, single-leaf Merkle proofs, external temporal anchoring, profile-conformant evidence records, and verifier independence.
related_specifications: draft-ietf-scitt-architecture-22 (IETF SCITT working group, intended Standards Track, currently in RFC editor publication queue AUTH48 state cluster C557)
draft-ietf-cose-merkle-tree-proofs-18 (IETF COSE/SCITT, AUTH48 state cluster C557)
RFC 8785 (JSON Canonicalization Scheme, IETF, Standards Track)
draft-fassbender-scitt-time-anchor-01 (IETF, Informational, related implementation context, expires 2026-10-29)
implementation_artifacts: actproof-events v1.4-rc1 (Apache-2.0 specification plus CC0 1.0 conformance test vectors, https://github.com/deyan-paroushev/actproof-events)

recipients.purpose: Independent verification of the standards engagement attestation that supports the maintainer's STS cohort application.
Working group situational awareness of an implementer engaging with the WG specifications.
Open archival of the engagement record for long-term independent verification.
